title: Verify existing implementation of login and register API endpoints
description: The login and register API endpoints already exist and are fully implemented. POST /login at src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts returns 200 with JWT tokens, POST /register at src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts returns 201. Both use AuthService (PBKDF2) for password hashing, with validation, appropriate HTTP status codes (400/401/409), and comprehensive unit tests in login.test.ts and register.test.ts.
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.ts - AuthService with PBKDF2 password verification via verifyPassword function
src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JWT token generation and validation
src/api/auth/register.ts - register function with password strength validation and Payload user creation
